texto: In the aftermath of their visions, Petit and Rice could not have imagined all that would be required of them. Neither Petit's dream of crossing the towers nor Rice's of fighting for justice came with an instruction manual. To accomplish their feats they'd have to overcome fear, test their plans against reality and maintain an unwavering focus on what their visions had revealed to them about their future selves.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Camille Sweeney sobre enfrentar incertezas com ação. A afirmação “In the aftermath of their visions, Petit and Rice could not have imagined all that would be requi…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a motivacao, vision, reflexao, útil em momentos de reflexao.
